operate_date.text: ระหว่างวันที่

root.sql:
SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_group_id, sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group.account_group_name , ( select tnest.account_control_id from sc_acc_m_account_master tnest where tnest.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_control_id ) as account_control_head , ( select tnest.account_name from sc_acc_m_account_master tnest where tnest.account_id = ( select tnest.account_control_id from sc_acc_m_account_master tnest where tnest.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_control_id ) ) as account_control_head_name ,
sc_acc_m_account_master.account_control_id , ( select tnest.account_name from sc_acc_m_account_master tnest where tnest.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_control_id ) as account_control_name , sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name,
sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_bb, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_bb, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_between, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_between, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_amount, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_amount
, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_control_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_close_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.nature, sc_acc_m_account_master.asset_group, sc_acc_m_account_master.asset_old_group, sc_acc_m_account_master.balsheet_group, sc_acc_m_account_master.asset_group_2565, sc_acc_m_account_master.group_krom
FROM sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep, sc_acc_m_account_master , sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group WHERE sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_group_id = sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group.account_group_id -- and sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_bb > 0 and ( dr_bb > 0 or cr_bb > 0 or dr_between > 0 or cr_between > 0 or dr_amount > 0 or cr_amount > 0 or dr_adj > 0 or cr_adj > 0 )
order by sc_acc_m_account_master.account_group_id , sc_acc_m_account_master.account_control_id , sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id
